51c1e176623331441300491d_17: Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it? People like you are especially welcome, friend!
51a51c1f3561642414006fde_26: It’s you! You’re the one who helped me escape from the Universal Brotherhood! How did you get here?
51b0eaa26336359408001add_20: Yes, it is, friend. You can enter with your Home or Sanctuary access keycard.
51b0eaa26336359408001add_23: Yes, it is, friend. I would not expect a new face to have such high clearance already. Your key card will allow you access.
51b0c78f6336359408001825_2: Yes, friend? What can I do for you?
51b62c74623331b0170063ce_0: Heyyyy, friend. Got some tasty morsels for you. Just what every well-dressed shadowrunner should have in their back pocket.
